name: Non-Anthropic OC routing smoke
description: One run per non-Anthropic OC model on claim-office-EM × v5.1-oc. Validates Portkey routing strings (portkey/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 etc.) and confirms each model can drive the v5.1-oc workflow before kicking off the 25-run RQ-model-quality-oc / RQ-model-novel-oc batches.
